issues.detail: The skill only covers happy path examples and does not address error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Build a project scaffolder CLI that asks name, template, features, and confirms
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports input/select/checkbox/confirm from '@inquirer/prompts' (v2 modular API), uses validate returning true-or-string on input, and passes choices as {name, value, description}; baseline uses the legacy inquirer.prompt([{type,...}]) API which the skill explicitly tells you to avoid.

scenarios.name: Add a password prompt and dynamic choices that change based on a prior answer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses password({ message, mask: '*' }) and computes the next checkbox's choices from the prior select() result inside an async wizard function; baseline uses legacy when/when-function callbacks tied to the old inquirer.prompt schema.
